synopsis:
**Curse of the Jedi!**

Killer Droids have taken over Darth Vader's flagship Super Star Destroyer, the Executor! But even with the powerful Kyberite shield, the Dark Lord of the Sith cannot fully control the Force! Will the lessons of Jedi Masters Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan save him from the Scourge, or make him a tool for its galactic conquest?
title: Darth Vader (2020) #37
